headline: Memory chip stocks just starting to show 'climactic top' moves
summary: The rally in memory chip stocks has driven Micron Technology (MU) shares 25% higher in the last week as its market cap crossed into the $1 trillion threshold. Sandisk (SNDK) continues its warpath after skyrocketing 4,100% over the past 12 months. Zacks Investment Research senior stock strategist Andrew Rocco explains why he believes these memory chip stocks are at the beginning of their "climactic blow-off top" moves and the growth potential they have as per their applications for training AI models.
